name: Shapednoise (IT) & Chosen1
description:
Shapednoise is the project of Berlin-based, Sicilian-born producer, DJ, and sound artist Nino Pedone. Known for blending industrial textures, experimental electronics, hardcore, hip-hop, and club music, he has developed a distinctive sound that pushes genre boundaries. He has released music on labels including Opal Tapes, Type, Numbers, and his own WEIGHT LOOMING, and has performed at leading festivals such as Berlin Atonal, CTM, Unsound, and Club To Club.

The Oslo-based experimental producer and guitarist is involved in projects even beyond our knowledge, most recently releasing the self-titled debut album with his band Skitne Kroner on Borgenheim Rosenhoff. Alongside his solo and band outputs he has for years built up a reputation for his mind-bending DJ-sets.
